race.description: Hands On Livestock Nutrien Classic Series F (L)
race.comment: An ideal draws gives NSW Derby winner HOLLYWOOD STRIP (4) his chance to gain revenge on BROOKLYN DAN through his third in the Gold Chalice in March, his lone defeat in 12 starts. He is three from three here including an easy win over older rivals in the Wagga Cup two back. Dominant from the front in last week's heat so expect him to push for that position again from the low barrier. The one to beat. BROOKLYN DAN (13) draws wide on the back row so may have to do it the hard way but he impressed in coming from the outside of the front line to win easily last week. That made it three wins on the trot and he has proven he has the ability to match HOLLYWOOD STRIP. Stablemate CARDIGAN DAN (7) was 6m off HOLLYWOOD STRIP when second last week. Won't be easy to turn the tables but he is reliable and well up to filling a placing. NOCTURNAL (10) has been racing well and draws for a trail so can be competitive again. Kiwi import ANDRETTI (6) worked last week so could be an improver.
